scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @meine-saetze/api" "npm run dev -w @meine-saetze/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @meine-saetze/web && npm run build -w @meine-saetze/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @meine-saetze/api && npm run typecheck -w @meine-saetze/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @meine-saetze/api && npm run lint -w @meine-saetze/web
